selections.name: Fidelightcayut
selections.reason: Drops in class from AOC company and gets the aggressive jockey upgrade with Paco Lopez, who excels on this tighter turf course.

selections.name: Flat Top Box
selections.reason: Consistent speed figures and tactical ability make him a strong fit for the Monmouth turf profile.

selections.name: Bar Fourteen
selections.reason: New York shipper dropping in class; the shipper advantage algorithm upgrades his raw figures significantly.

selections.name: Bay Street Money
selections.reason: Inside post advantage on the turf course; should save ground and factor late.

danger_horse.name: Leo Monte
danger_horse.reason: Kelly Breen trainee with back class who could wake up at a price.

selections.name: Twelve Treasures
selections.reason: Perfect setup for the Monmouth dirt bias. Pure early speed ('E' type) drawn inside with Paco Lopez in the irons.

selections.name: Doroteo
selections.reason: Inside draw with Tyler Gaffalione; projects to get a perfect stalking trip right behind the speed.

selections.name: Khozeiress
selections.reason: Class drop from stakes company makes him dangerous, though he will have to overcome the outside post.

selections.name: La Frost
selections.reason: Lightly raced and has room to improve; figures are competitive for the level.

danger_horse.name: Gianluca Be Lucky
danger_horse.reason: Has tactical speed and could pick up the pieces if the top two duel.

selections.name: Kadena
selections.reason: Massive NYRA shipper advantage dropping from Aqueduct AOC. Inside post on a speed-biased track makes her the controlling speed.

selections.name: She's A Gamer
selections.reason: Paco Lopez takes the mount; possesses excellent early speed to press the favorite.

selections.name: Gridlock
selections.reason: Consistent performer who rarely runs a bad race; should be in the mix for exotics.

selections.name: Tavin
selections.reason: Steps up in class but has the tactical speed to secure a good position early.

danger_horse.name: Winkiwinki
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw could allow her to save ground and sneak into the superfecta.

races.exotic_strategy: BEST BET - Golden Gap overlay. Win Bet #1, Exacta 1 / 4,6, Trifecta 1 / 4,6 / 2,3,4,6

selections.name: Whiskey Decision
selections.reason: Elite Chad Brown/Flavien Prat combination. Her late pace figures are superior, and she receives a class upgrade.

selections.name: Gimme A Nother (saf)
selections.reason: Inside post advantage on the turf course. High-class international form makes her a massive threat.

selections.name: Grayosh
selections.reason: The 'other' Chad Brown with Tyler Gaffalione; graded stakes placed and very dangerous.

selections.name: Don't Jinx It
selections.reason: Clement trainee with solid figures; tactical speed fits the course profile well.

danger_horse.name: Creative Stuff
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw could allow her to outrun her long odds.

selections.name: National Charter
selections.reason: Inside post holds a massive advantage in two-turn dirt routes here. Gaffalione can control the pace from the rail.

selections.name: Schoolyardsuperman
selections.reason: Chad Brown/Flavien Prat combo on dirt is lethal; strong speed figures make him the primary danger.

selections.name: Baby Vino
selections.reason: Paco Lopez rides; will need to overcome the outside post but has the tactical speed to do so.

selections.name: Tricky Business
selections.reason: Inside draw helps; Weaver trainee should get a ground-saving trip.

danger_horse.name: Star Sweeper
danger_horse.reason: Could hit the board if the pace collapses.

selections.name: Program Trading (gb)
selections.reason: Elite Grade 1 winner for Chad Brown. Stands out on class and speed figures; the clear horse to beat.

selections.name: Sand Pipes
selections.reason: Inside post advantage on the turf with Paco Lopez; projects for a perfect ground-saving trip.

selections.name: Ridari (fr)
selections.reason: Clement trainee with strong European form; inside draw is a major plus.

selections.name: Nebras (gb)
selections.reason: Another Chad Brown runner; outside post is a slight downgrade but class is undeniable.

danger_horse.name: Naptown
danger_horse.reason: Capable of closing late for a minor award.

selections.name: Clever Charlie
selections.reason: Inside speed in a two-turn dirt route is the golden profile at Monmouth. Should control the race.

selections.name: Happy Offering
selections.reason: Paco Lopez takes the mount, but the far outside post in a route is a massive detriment. Upgraded on jockey, downgraded on post.

selections.name: Last Romance
selections.reason: Consistent figures and should get a good stalking trip mid-pack.

selections.name: Doin This
selections.reason: Capable of picking up pieces late if the pace gets hot.

danger_horse.name: Bon Courage
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw could allow for a ground-saving trip at a price.

selections.name: Enjoying
selections.reason: Paco Lopez rides the favorite; tactical speed fits the course perfectly.

selections.name: Lucky Louisa
selections.reason: Tyler Gaffalione takes the mount; figures are competitive for the maiden claiming level.

selections.name: Mind Boggling
selections.reason: Inside draw and Samuel Marin; should save ground and factor late.

selections.name: Tiz Awesome
selections.reason: Outside post is tough, but has shown flashes of ability.

danger_horse.name: La Pluma
danger_horse.reason: Could hit the board in a weak field.

selections.name: Bishops Bay
selections.reason: Elite speed figure profile for Brad Cox and Flavien Prat. Should clear early and dominate.

selections.name: East Avenue
selections.reason: High-class runner, but the outside post in a dirt route is a significant disadvantage here.

selections.name: Grand Mo The First
selections.reason: Paco Lopez rides; inside draw gives him a tactical edge over East Avenue.

selections.name: Grande
selections.reason: Pletcher trainee drawn inside; will save all the ground.

danger_horse.name: Point Dume
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw and solid recent form make him a threat for the exotics.

selections.name: Debt Limit (fr)
selections.reason: Chad Brown and Flavien Prat combo. Drops in class and has superior late pace figures.

selections.name: Relative Value (gb)
selections.reason: The other Chad Brown entry with Gaffalione; strong European pedigree fits well here.

selections.name: Tifosi
selections.reason: Paco Lopez on the rail in a turf route is a deadly angle. Will save all the ground.

selections.name: Golden Channel
selections.reason: Weaver trainee with tactical speed; should sit a good trip mid-pack.

danger_horse.name: Copper Ghost
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw could allow him to sneak into the superfecta at a price.
